title: Mantooine Minuet
content:
{{Top|ca|leg|italics=1|notoc=1}} {{InUniverseMedia |image= |name=Mantooine Minuet |author= |editor= |illustrator= |artist= |performer= |publisher= |release date= |media type=Song[[Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand 3|''Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand'' 3]] |pages= |published in= |genre=[[Classical music|Classical]] dance [[Music/Legends|music]]{{CSWECite|II|278|Mantooine Minuet}} }} {{Quote|The Emperor is gone. Everyone who held him dear needs to rally together to keep the Empire alive. There are things you know that could help in that regard.''"
"''The Emperor enjoyed the ''Mantooine Minuet''. Does that help?|[[Ivak]] seeks Mara Jade's help|}} The '''''Mantooine Minuet''''' was a piece of [[Classical music|classical]] dance [[Music/Legends|music]]. An innocuous piece of music, it passed review of the [[Imperial Board of Culture]] outright{{SW|url=news/slugthrowers-part-2|series=Slugthrowers: An Overview of Popular Music and Musicians in a Galaxy Far, Far Away|text=Part 2|nolive=1}} and was favored by [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. Following the Emperor's [[Death/Legends|death]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' [[Emperor's Hand/Legends|Emperor's Hand]] [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] was captured by [[Director of Imperial Intelligence]] [[Ysanne Isard]]. Upon interrogation, Jade, who had identified herself as a dancer in the Imperial court, claimed that the Emperor enjoyed the ''Mantooine Minuet'' as a way of appearing obtuse about her real role. ''Mantooine Minuet'' shared its name with the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Mantooine/Legends|Mantooine]].''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' ==Behind the scenes== The ''Mantooine Minuet'' was first mentioned in the [[Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand 3|third issue]] of ''[[Star Wars: Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand]]'', a [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] written by [[Timothy Zahn]] and [[Michael A. Stackpole|Michael Stackpole]] published by [[Dark Horse Comics]] on [[October 7]]th, [[1998]].{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54455/star_wars_mara_jade_-_by_the_emperors_hand_1998_3|text=Star Wars: Mara Jade - By the Emperor's Hand (1998) #3}} In real life, a [[Wikipedia:Minuet|minuet]] is a piece of music to accompany a dance.{{WebCite|url=https://dictionary.cambridge.org/dictionary/english-french/minuet|text=Minuet|quote=(a piece of music to accompany) an old type of graceful dance.|work=[https://dictionary.cambridge.org dictionary.cambridge.org]|archivedate=20151017053534}} ==Appearances== *{{GalaxiesAED}} {{Mo}} *[[Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand 3|''Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand'' 3]] {{1stm}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *{{SW|url=news/slugthrowers-part-2|series=Slugthrowers: An Overview of Popular Music and Musicians in a Galaxy Far, Far Away|text=Part 2|nolive=1}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Dance]] [[Category:Songs]]
